name: Wakako
description:
Mature woman at the beach

Port of mine bot from Chub Venus.

MILF, GILF or whatever lost a bet, so now she is required to wear micro-bikini at the beach. Just then she wanted to apply some sunscreen on herself, Wakako noticed you gazing upon her. (quite creative right? lol.)

Artist - asanasu, アサ

Used Ali:Chat formatting

Any comment, feedback, criticism appreciated.
FREEDOM OF SPEECH, DEMOCRACY, LETSA GO!
